name: 品牌發布會身份揭露
description: 在全行業矚目的品牌發布會上，女主作為華家少奶奶正式亮相。奢華場景中的身份翻轉讓視覺和情節雙重衝擊達到頂峰。
tags: 公眾場合中多重身份的集中揭露，反派在眾目睽睽下崩潰

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: I want to formally introduce you all to my granddaughter-in-law and the future lady of the Hua family. She is Goian. / Now Miss Yi is really the clown here.
examples.context: 公眾場合中多重身份的集中揭露，反派在眾目睽睽下崩潰
